replies.text: I mean, it's just the noun version of the verb scold. It's been around for a long time. We just added "wokescold" to be more specific.

replies.text:
I remember first seeing her back in 2014, and honestly, I think she’s one of the politically homeless center-left types. 

We don’t really have a voice in the party because we’re either not outright communists who say “it will work this time I’m sure” or establishment hacks who betray our principles the instant life gets hard. 

Much as people would sometimes say that Trump was a classical liberal, I do think she’s got the same clout. She is left leaning ideologically, but she’s not capitulating to the Cathedral.
